chunks.title: David's Offering and the People's Response
chunks.reason: Narrative account of David presenting resources and the assembly's generous response.

chunks.title: David's Prayer of Thanksgiving
chunks.reason: A continuous prayer where David blesses God and petitions for Solomon.

chunks.title: Crowning of Solomon
chunks.reason: Narrative describing the people's worship and Solomon's enthronement.

chunks.title: David's Reign and Death Summary
chunks.reason: Concluding summary of David's reign length, death, and historical records.
